description_long: This is a single-story brick house with a flat, dark gray roof and a rectangular footprint. The front yard features a small driveway with two parked cars, a walkway leading to the main entrance, and well-maintained hedges and trees. Large windows are distributed along the front and sides, providing ample natural light to the interior. The rear of the house includes a patio area with double doors and a small landscaped section. The property is enclosed by a low fence, and the landscaping includes several mature trees and shrubs. The overall design is simple and functional, with a focus on suburban comfort and accessibility.
description: A single-story brick house with a flat roof, driveway, and landscaped yard, featuring large windows and a rear patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway with two cars, main entrance, hedges, and a large tree.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, side windows, and the driveway extending to the front.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the patio area, double doors, and a small landscaped section with a tree.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side wall, chimney, and part of the fenced backyard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small porch, steps, and a single door flanked by hedges and a tree.
